patch.value: GH-595: pm list --json envelope — pagination keys vanish when results fit one page and filters emits ~22 null keys (~44% bloat)

Pagination keys (total/has_more/truncated/next_cursor) are stably present on every list --json envelope regardless of truncation; filters object omits null/unset keys (or lean mode does); measured token reduction recorded; contracts and cursor-fingerprint semantics stay consistent with pm-fgih

GH-595. pm list --json: (A) total/has_more/truncated/next_cursor present only when truncated — absent exactly when an agent wants total without paginating; (B) filters object emits all ~24 keys with ~22 null (~44% envelope bloat). Fix: stable pagination key-set on every envelope + null-omission (lean semantics live in pm-cfed; cursor fingerprint semantics pm-fgih). PR#605 named this reconciled; item makes it canonical.
